mapper.insert:
insert into tc_pollination_tb(id,experiment_num,sample_apply_num, pollination_apply_num,m_region_num,f_region_num, m_sample_code,f_sample_code,m_seed_num, f_seed_num,f_breed_name,m_breed_name, m_vector_task_code,f_vector_task_code,m_generation_code, f_generation_code,m_tc_gene,f_tc_gene, pollination_date,pollination_method_code,pollination_method_name, harvest_type_code,harvest_type_name,remark) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.experimentNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.sampleApplyNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pollinationApplyNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.mRegionNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.fRegionNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.mSampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.fSampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.mSeedNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fSeedNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.fBreedName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.mBreedName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.mVectorTaskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.fVectorTaskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.mGenerationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fGenerationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.mTcGene,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.fTcGene,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pollinationDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.pollinationMethodCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.pollinationMethodName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.harvestTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.harvestTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
